nodes.name: GitHub Webhook
nodes.notes: GitHub → Settings → Webhooks → Payload URL: https://<n8n-host>/webhook/github-fastapi-ci (or /webhook-test/... while testing). Content type: application/json. Events: Just the push event.

parameters.command: =/bin/bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; if [ -f "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env" ]; then set -a; source "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env"; set +a; fi; export GIT_SHA="{{ $json.sha }}" BRANCH="{{ $json.branch }}" REPO_DIR="${REPO_DIR:-/home/yashree/development/fast-api}" IMAGE_REPO="${IMAGE_REPO:-smitambalia/n8n}"; "${REPO_DIR}/scripts/ci-deploy.sh" 2>&1'

nodes.name: SSH: Build Push Deploy
nodes.notes: Create n8n credential: SSH Password or SSH Private Key → host 10.42.0.1 (or host LAN IP), user with docker+kubectl access (e.g. yashree). Attach that credential to this node.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.summary, blocks: [ { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: $json.summary + '\n*Image:* `' + $json.image + '`\n*Branch:* ' + $json.branch + ' by ' + $json.pusher } } ] }) }}

nodes.name: Notify Slack
nodes.notes: Set env SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL on n8n, or replace URL with your Slack Incoming Webhook. Disable this node if unused.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ '@type': 'MessageCard', '@context': 'http://schema.org/extensions', summary: $json.summary, themeColor: $json.success ? '00FF00' : 'FF0000', title: $json.success ? 'FastAPI CI/CD Success' : 'FastAPI CI/CD Failed', text: 'Image: ' + $json.image + ' | Branch: ' + $json.branch + ' | By: ' + $json.pusher }) }}

nodes.name: Notify Teams
nodes.notes: Set env TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL on n8n, or paste Incoming Webhook URL. Disable if unused.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, skipped: true, reason: 'Not main/master', branch: $json.branch, sha: $json.sha } }}
